title: Project Management Assistant
required_skills: Native-level German AND Chinese — HARD REQUIREMENT (both simultaneously)
Cross-functional team alignment (Sales, Product, Technical, Solution)

Cross-functional team alignment (HSBC: 6 workstreams, multi-team interface)

Coordinate Sales, Product, Technical, Solution teams
Track project progress and facilitate information flow

GRG Banking + IPC: both Chinese companies, cross-cultural B2B coordination experience
